name: Enel Americas S.A. Reg. Shs (Sp
summary: Enel Americas S.A. is a Chilean utility company that generates and distributes electricity in South America. It is part of the Enel Group, a multinational energy company, and its primary operations are in Chile, Argentina, Brazil, Colombia, and Peru. Enel Americas focuses on electricity generation from renewable sources and conventional power plants, as well as the distribution of electricity to residential, commercial, and industrial customers.
